home_tagline: Get help, or give help. No account needed.
hero_document_sub: Photos, notes, audio. Stays on your phone.
card_stay_safe_sub: Crisis steps, rights, notices. Works offline.
card_directory_sub: Checked orgs and resources, by city.
gv_food: Food, water, shelter, charging, a ride
opens_after_checks: This part opens after safety checks finish.
works_now: The Stay safe pages and the Directory work now.
staysafe_pending: Safety steps are being reviewed by a medic and a lawyer.
notices_what: Official notices appear here, signed by our team.
record_keep: Records stay on your phone until you send them.
record_location_note: Exact location is removed from every record.
nearby_how: Updates are delayed and cover whole areas, never exact spots.
directory_empty: The directory is being checked. Entries appear after review.
set_identity_1: Your account is made on this phone when you first send something.
set_identity_2: There is no name, phone number, or email.
set_identity_3: Write down the backup words when they appear.
set_identity_4: If you lose the backup words, you lose the account.
set_identity_5: No one can reset it. That is what keeps it safe.
set_safe_1: Close, at the top, opens the Directory and clears your screen.
set_safe_2: The app looks plain on purpose.
set_offline_2: Anything you send waits for signal. The app tells you.
label_team_meaning: Someone on our team confirmed this and its contact.
label_nearby_meaning: Local users marked this as real. Not team-confirmed. Use your judgement.
label_unchecked_meaning: No one has confirmed this. Be careful.
label_problem_meaning: People flagged this. It may be wrong or old. Check before you rely on it.
checking_intro: Every item shows one of four labels.
limits_intro: Read this before you rely on the app.
limits_1: Your network provider can see that you use this site.
limits_2: So can Cloudflare, the company that hosts it.
limits_3: If someone takes your unlocked phone, they can read what is on it.
limits_4: Saved records stay on this phone only.
limits_5: A phone reset, seizure, or app wipe destroys them.
limits_6: We keep no name, number, or email. We cannot reset your account.
limits_7: What you send sealed, we cannot read.
limits_8: Courts can still order companies to hand over traffic records.
limits_9: This app is served from the web.
limits_10: A forced, targeted change to it could go unseen.
limits_11: The phone app version, when it comes, will be stronger.
limits_12: Photos here help preserve events. We cannot promise a court accepts them.
error_body: Check the address, or go back to Home.
record_new_sub: Photos, notes, or audio. Stays on your phone.
record_none: No records on this phone yet.
record_stays: This stays on your phone until you send it.
record_video_note: We can't hide faces in video yet. Film carefully.
record_pick_photo_intro: Pick a photo from this phone.
redact_intro: Drag a solid box over each face, badge, or number plate.
redact_hint: Drag across a face to cover it.
redact_decode_failed: This photo could not open here. Keep it private, or pick another.
redact_confirm_q: Did you cover every face and ID?
redact_private_note: The photo stays on this phone. No public copy is made.
audio_no_voice: Voices are not changed. The audio stays on this phone.
import_intro: Paste a link to a public post or clip. We save the link, not the video, for now.
describe_area_ph: City or area. No exact address.
saved_body: Your record is on this phone only.
err_generic: Something did not work. Try again.
err_mic: We could not use the microphone.
incidents_intro: Incidents people have documented. Each shows how it was checked.
incidents_not_open: The public record is not open yet.
directory_intro: Places and groups that help. Each shows how it was checked.
dir_report_thanks: Thanks. A person will check this.
card_draft_banner: Draft. Under legal and medical review. Do not rely on this yet.
